name: mostParamSetData
title: mostParamSetData
syntax: long mostParamSetData(mostAmsMessage msg, char paramadr[], byte data[], long datalen); // form 1
long mostParamSetData(mostAmsMessage msg, char paramadr[], long arrayIndex, byte data[], long datalen); // form 2
description: Setting of parameters of the String type or RawStream in an AMS message using the parameter name from the XML function catalog.
When writing a string parameter with mostParamSetData 'data' has to include the coding byte and terminator character (mostParamSetString can be used for ASCII coding).

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Message in which the parameter bytes should be written.

parameters.name: paramAdr
parameters.description: Identification of parameters (see Symbolic Identification of Parameters).

parameters.name: arrayIndex
parameters.description: Parameter index in arrays or sequences. This declaration overwrites the indexing in the brackets of <paramAdr>.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Data from which the parameter bytes are copied.

parameters.name: datalen
parameters.description: Number of valid parameter bytes that are copied to the message.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
